hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: I build modern web applications with React, TypeScript, and Node.js, focusing on performance, scalability, and clean user experiences.

about.title: A Full-Stack Developer
bio: I'm a Full-Stack Developer focused on building scalable and maintainable web applications using modern technologies like TypeScript, React, Next.js, and Node.js.
I enjoy creating clean user interfaces, improving performance, and developing systems that balance user experience with solid engineering practices.
My goal is to build products that are not only visually polished, but also practical, efficient, and reliable in real-world use.

infoPanel.title: Let's Build Something Great Together
infoPanel.description: Whether you have a project in mind, a business inquiry, or an opportunity to discuss, feel free to reach out. I'm always open to meaningful collaborations and interesting ideas.
